title: cliffortia × mirabilis
intro: Cliffortia × mirabilis, also known as the Cape cliffortia or Rock rose, is a hybrid plant species native to the southwestern region of South Africa. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Cliffortia × mirabilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory infections.
